description: Multi-Signal Semantic Retrieval: single-table multi-signal weighted k-NN, no predicates. MSA({FSS(∅, s_i)}, weighted_sum, K). 100 queries over facts_50k (fact_text_emb cosine + mol_ecfp jaccard).
